title: Build Creative Response
description: Response containing the transformed or generated creative manifest(s), ready for use with preview_creative or sync_creatives. Returns either a single creative_manifest, an array of creative_manifests (for multi-format requests), or error information.

oneOf.title: BuildCreativeSuccess
oneOf.description: Single-format success response. Returned when the request used target_format_id.

creative_manifest.description: The generated or transformed creative manifest

sandbox.description: When true, this response contains simulated data from sandbox mode.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when generated asset URLs in the manifest expire. Set to the earliest expiration across all generated assets. Re-build the creative after this time to get fresh URLs.

oneOf.title: BuildCreativeMultiSuccess
oneOf.description: Multi-format success response. Returned when the request used target_format_ids. Contains one manifest per requested format. Multi-format requests are atomic — all formats must succeed or the entire request fails with an error response. Array order corresponds to the target_format_ids request order.

creative_manifests.description: Array of generated creative manifests, one per requested format. Each manifest contains its own format_id identifying which format it was generated for.

sandbox.description: When true, this response contains simulated data from sandbox mode.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the earliest generated asset URL expires across all manifests. Re-build after this time to get fresh URLs.

errors.description: Array of errors explaining why creative generation failed
